description: The Set Tag node sets the Tag of the provided instance slot upon calling * (Call).

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to set the Instance (Slot)'s tag to Tag (String).
fields.Instance: Slot to set the property for.
fields.Tag: The value to set Instance (Slot)'s Tag field to when * (Call) is called.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse when Instance (Slot)'s tag is set to Tag (String) when * (Call) is called.
